name: Shimmering Wool
lore:
&7A splendid wool found nowhere else;

&7it caresses your fingers and

&7exudes a unique warmth the likes of

&7which you have never experienced

&7before, and likely never will again.



&eRight-click to view recipes!



&6&lLEGENDARY&r

data.name: Shimmering Wool
data.description: A splendid wool found nowhere else; it caresses your fingers and exudes a unique warmth the likes of which you have never experienced before, and likely never will again.
